ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of the loan application */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer */,
  "credit_analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit analyst */,
  "risk_assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the loan application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("loan_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "employment_duration" TEXT /* Employment duration of the applicant */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the applicant */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Credit history of the applicant (e.g., good, average, poor) */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social security number of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan product */,
  "loan_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan product in months */,
  "min_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount of the loan product */,
  "max_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount of the loan product */,
  "collateral_required" INTEGER /* Whether collateral is required for the loan product */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the loan product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "credit_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "credit_history_description" TEXT /* Description of the credit history */,
  "credit_history_date" TEXT /* Date of the credit history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the applicant */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Employer of the applicant */,
  "employment_duration" TEXT /* Employment duration of the applicant */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the applicant */,
  "monthly_expenses" REAL /* Monthly expenses of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "income_amount" REAL /* Income amount of the applicant */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of the income */,
  "income_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the income (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "loan_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan payment entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the loan payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of the loan payment (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defaulters" (
  "defaulter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defaulter entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "default_date" TEXT /* Date of the default */,
  "default_amount" REAL /* Amount of the default */,
  "default_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defaulter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defaulters_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment" (
  "risk_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "risk_score" INTEGER /* Risk score of the loan */,
  "risk_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Category of the risk (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, credit analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the user's device (e.g., browser, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view loan applications, approve loans) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_application_versions" (
  "loan_application_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application version */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the loan application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_application_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_application_versions_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_product_categories" (
  "loan_product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product category */,
  "loan_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the loan product (e.g., personal, car, home) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_product_categories_loan_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("loan_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collateral" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collateral entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral (e.g., car, house, property) */,
  "collateral_value" REAL /* Value of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collateral_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., origination, late payment) */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)
